calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follow: DEFENDANT BSI FINANCIAL SERVICE, INC. and NUVIEW FIANCIAL SERVICES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend. Plaintiff to 1) allege tender, 2) Contract, performance under contract and breach by each defendant; 3) actual present controversy not duplicative of first cause of action. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, not reproted. (501/REQ)

Osc Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Apr-25-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follow : plaintiff's osc re: Preliminary Injunction. Off calendar, 1) Moving party failed to comply w ith court order of apr-06-2012 and no points and authorities before apr-09-2012; 2) TRO dissolved. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, not reported. (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-20-2012 Continued To May-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BSI FINANCIAL SERVICE, INC. and NUVIEW FIANCIAL SERVICES DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to May 10, 2012 to be heard at 9:30am in Department 501. The Moving party is ordered to provide Department 501 with a courtesy copy of the operative pleading pursuant to Local Rule 2.6C. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

Ntc Of Motion For Issuance For Preliminary Injunction And Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Mar-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF TERESA MASSIMO's Motion For Issuance For Preliminary Injunction And Order To Show Cause is off Calendar. Moving Party failed to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and the Court's Order. udge Ronald E. Quidachay, Not reported (D501)

Ntc Of Motion For Issuance For Preliminary Injunction And Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Mar-07-2012 Continued To Mar-20-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF TERESA MASSIMO Motion For Issuance For Preliminary Injunction And Order To Show Cause.
The motion will be heard on March 20, 2012 at 9:30am in Department 501. The moving party is ordered to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 501 by March 12, 2012 as required by Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
